facilities.name: Kahala Nui
facilities.description: Kahala Nui is a nonprofit continuing care retirement community in Honolulu's Kahala neighborhood, offering independent living, the Hi'olani Assisted Living Center (67 licensed beds), memory care, and the 20-bed Hi'olani Care Center skilled nursing unit. The Hi'olani Care Center holds a CMS 5-star overall rating with no fines, complaints, or inspection problems reported in the last three years, and nursing staff time per resident exceeds state and national averages.

facilities.name: Arcadia Retirement Residence
facilities.description: Arcadia Retirement Residence, established in 1967, is a nonprofit continuing care retirement community affiliated with the United Church of Christ, set on three acres in Honolulu's Makiki neighborhood. It offers independent living apartments, assisted living, memory care, and an on-site skilled nursing unit that holds a CMS 5-star overall rating, with U.S. News marking both short-term rehab and long-term care as High Performing.

facilities.name: 15 Craigside
facilities.description: 15 Craigside is a 13-story nonprofit continuing care retirement community in Honolulu's Nuuanu area, operated by the Arcadia Family of Companies. The tower provides 170 independent living units (140 one-bedroom apartments and 30 studios), assisted living services throughout the building, and a 45-bed skilled nursing unit that holds a CMS 5-star overall rating with a High Performing long-term care designation.

facilities.name: Maluhia
facilities.description: Maluhia is a government-operated skilled nursing and intermediate care facility in Honolulu's Kalihi neighborhood, serving Medicare and Medicaid residents since 1967. The 158-bed facility holds a CMS 5-star overall rating, well above the national average, and U.S. News rates its long-term care as High Performing.

facilities.name: The Plaza at Pearl City
facilities.description: The Plaza at Pearl City is a 158-bed community operated by Hawaii-based The Plaza Assisted Living, offering independent living, assisted living, the Hali'a memory care program, and short-term respite stays.

facilities.name: The Plaza at Punchbowl
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 29 ratings on Senior Care Authority; 4.7/5 across 10 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter (July 2026)
facilities.description: The Plaza at Punchbowl is a multistory senior living community near downtown Honolulu operated by Hawaii-based The Plaza Assisted Living, offering independent living and assisted living.

facilities.name: Good Samaritan Society - Pohai Nani
facilities.description: Pohai Nani is a continuing care retirement community operated by the nonprofit Good Samaritan Society on a 16-acre campus in Kaneohe, with views of the Ko'olau Mountains and Kaneohe Bay.

facilities.name: 'Ilima at Leihano
facilities.description: 'Ilima at Leihano is a Kisco Senior Living community set on four landscaped acres in the heart of Kapolei, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care in studio, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom apartments.

facilities.name: Roselani Place
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 19 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Roselani Place in Kahului is Maui's only private-pay independent living, assisted living, and memory care community, licensed for 144 residents and operated by Alii Community Care.

facilities.name: Regency at Puakea
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 68 aggregated ratings on Senior Care Authority (July 2026)
facilities.description: Regency at Puakea is Kauai's primary retirement and assisted living community, with 82 apartments on 5.65 landscaped acres in Lihue featuring a pool, spa, and mountain views.

facilities.name: The Ivy at Hawaii Kai
facilities.description: A large independent living, assisted living, and memory care community in Honolulu's Hawaii Kai neighborhood, operated under the Ivy Living brand of Oakmont Senior Living. The community offers medication management, incontinence care, higher-acuity care, and individualized care plans, and is known for its well-maintained grounds and strong sense of community.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 94 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.6/5 across 48 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: Holiday Kalama Heights
facilities.description: A pet-friendly independent senior living community in Kihei on Maui's south shore, minutes from Kamaole Beach Park. Three homestyle meals a day, weekly housekeeping, utilities, and scheduled transportation are bundled into one monthly rate, and residents praise the staff, activities, and beach-close location.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 15 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: Hale Makua - Wailuku
facilities.description: A 124-bed skilled nursing facility in Wailuku offering long-term care, short-term rehabilitation, and dementia care, part of the Hale Makua Health Services organization founded on Maui in 1947 and now affiliated with Ohana Pacific Health. Medicare rates the facility 5 stars overall, and U.S. News rates it High Performing for both short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Kula Hospital
facilities.description: A hospital-based skilled nursing and intermediate care facility in upcountry Kula on Maui, operated by Maui Health, with 105 long-term care beds. CMS rates it 4 stars overall with 5-star staffing and 5-star quality measures, and U.S. News has repeatedly named it among the nation's Best Nursing Homes with a High Performing rating.

facilities.name: Garden Isle Healthcare and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.description: A 109-bed skilled nursing facility located on the Wilcox Memorial Hospital campus in Lihue, operated by Ohana Pacific Health. It offers short-term rehabilitation with physical, occupational, and speech therapy alongside long-term care, and carries a CMS overall rating of 4 stars (some sources list 5).

facilities.name: Ka Punawai Ola
facilities.description: A 120-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility in Kapolei operated by Life Care Centers of America; the name is Hawaiian for 'well-spring of health and living waters.' It provides short-term rehabilitation, long-term care, and post-operative recovery, carries a CMS overall rating of 4 stars with 5-star quality measures, and was named a U.S. News 2026 Best Nursing Home with High Performing ratings for both short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: The Villas
facilities.description: A 163-bed post-acute care and rehabilitation facility on the St. Francis Kupuna Village campus in Honolulu's Liliha neighborhood, operated by Ohana Pacific Health (formerly the Clarence T.C. Ching Villas at St. Francis). It is an innovative short-stay, high-acuity skilled nursing facility serving patients who need clinical and rehabilitative care before returning home, with a CMS overall rating of 4 stars and a U.S. News High Performing rating for short-term rehab.

facilities.name: Maunalani Nursing and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.description: Honolulu's first not-for-profit skilled nursing facility, open since 1950, sitting atop Wilhelmina Rise in Kaimuki with panoramic views of Diamond Head. The 100-bed 501(c)(3) facility provides long-term care and rehabilitation, and CMS rates it 5 stars overall with 5-star staffing and quality measures.

facilities.name: Leahi Hospital
facilities.description: Leahi Hospital is a state-government-owned skilled nursing facility in the Kaimuki area of Honolulu, operated by the Hawaii Health Systems Corporation. It provides long-term skilled nursing and rehabilitation care and holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars. The campus also runs an adult day health center serving the surrounding community.

facilities.name: Avalon Care Center - Honolulu
facilities.description: Avalon Care Center - Honolulu is a 108-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility operated by Avalon Health Care. It carries a CMS overall rating of 3 stars, with strong quality-measure (5-star) and staffing (4-star) component ratings offset by a lower (2-star) health-inspection rating. It offers short-term rehabilitation and long-term skilled nursing care.

facilities.name: Life Care Center of Hilo
facilities.description: Life Care Center of Hilo is a for-profit skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility on the Big Island, operated by Life Care Centers of America. It holds a CMS overall rating of 3 stars, driven by strong quality measures (5-star) and staffing (4-star) with a weaker health-inspection score (2-star). It provides short-term rehab and long-term skilled nursing care.

facilities.name: Yukio Okutsu State Veterans Home
facilities.description: Yukio Okutsu State Veterans Home is a 95-bed skilled nursing facility in Hilo serving veterans on the Big Island, affiliated with Hilo Medical Center and the Hawaii Health Systems Corporation. It is Medicare- and Medicaid-certified and holds a CMS overall rating of 3 stars. It provides long-term skilled nursing and rehabilitation care.

facilities.name: Kalakaua Gardens
facilities.description: Kalakaua Gardens is a 49-bed senior living community in Honolulu offering skilled nursing alongside assisted living and memory care. Its Medicare-certified skilled nursing unit holds a CMS overall rating of 3 stars. The community provides short-term rehabilitation and long-term care with restaurant-style dining and social programming.

facilities.name: Faith Harbor Adult Care
facilities.description: Faith Harbor Adult Care is a small residential care home in East Honolulu (Aina Haina area) licensed for up to six residents, offering memory care in a home-like setting.
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 4 reviews on SeniorAdvisor and 4.9/5 across 4 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Small Honolulu adult residential care home offering memory care, with well-documented positive reviews: 5.0/5 (4 reviews) on SeniorAdvisor and 4.9/5 (4 reviews) on A Place for Mom as of July 2026.

facilities.name: Family Ties ARCH II
facilities.description: Family Ties ARCH II is a small adult residential care home in the Kalihi area of Honolulu, listed as a Type I Expanded Adult Residential Care Home licensed for up to five residents.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 ("Excellent") across 4 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Small Honolulu Type I Expanded ARCH with documented positive reviews: 4.5/5 across 4 reviews on A Place for Mom as of July 2026.

facilities.name: Vilma's Adult Care Home
facilities.description: Vilma's Adult Care Home is a small Expanded Adult Residential Care Home in the Liliha/Kalihi area of Honolulu, purpose-built as a care home in 2006 and run by a certified caregiver, offering residential care and memory care. Families commend the hands-on, attentive care.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 3 reviews on A Place for Mom and rated 5.0/5 on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Small Honolulu Expanded ARCH (purpose-built as a care home in 2006) offering memory care, with documented positive reviews: 4.8/5 across 3 reviews on A Place for Mom plus a 5.0 SeniorAdvisor rating as of July 2026.

facilities.name: Kina 'Ole Estate
facilities.description: Kina 'Ole Estate is a small windward-Oahu care home in Kaneohe housing up to eight live-in residents, offering assisted living, memory care and expanded care with 24-hour staffing. It is consistently cited as one of the highest-rated small homes in the Kaneohe/Kailua area.
facilities.review_note: 13 reviews on Yelp and 5.0/5 across 2 reviews on A Place for Mom; aggregators rank it the highest-rated community in the city (9.6/10) (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Small Kaneohe care home (up to 8 residents) offering memory care, with well-documented positive review volume: 13 Yelp reviews and a 5.0/5 A Place for Mom rating, ranked the top-rated community in the city by aggregators as of July 2026.

facilities.name: Kina 'Ole Estate Elima
facilities.description: Kina 'Ole Estate Elima is the Kailua location of the Kina 'Ole Estate family of small care homes, housing up to eight residents with private rooms and 24-hour supervision.
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 2 reviews on A Place for Mom / Caring.com; part of a group rated 9.6/10 and highest in the city (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Small Kailua care home (up to 8 residents) in the well-regarded Kina 'Ole Estate group, with documented positive reviews: 5.0/5 across 2 reviews as of July 2026.

facilities.name: Serenity Hawaii Care Home
facilities.description: Serenity Hawaii Care Home is a small Adult Residential Care Home (Level 1) in a residential Waipahu neighborhood near Pearl Harbor, hosting up to five residents. The operator is described as experienced and specialized in Alzheimer's care and rehabilitation.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 2 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Small Waipahu Adult Residential Care Home (Level 1, up to 5 residents) with a documented Alzheimer's-care focus and positive reviews: 4.8/5 across 2 reviews on A Place for Mom as of July 2026.

facilities.name: Prime Health Services Care Home
facilities.description: Prime Health Services Care Home is a small residential care home in Aiea offering memory care with 24-hour staffing and personalized care plans.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 2 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Small Aiea residential care home offering memory care, with documented positive reviews: 4.5/5 across 2 reviews on A Place for Mom as of July 2026.

facilities.name: Nuuanu Hale
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating reported as 1 star by multiple aggregator sources citing federal Care Compare data (NursingHomeSite, elderguide, July 2026 snapshots); at least one other snapshot instead cites 2 stars, reflecting CMS's month-to-month rating updates. CMS flagged this facility as having a documented pattern of poor care for at least one month between August 2024 and July 2025 (closely-monitored status). ProPublica Nursing Home Inspect records show 77 total cited deficiencies and $95,300 in fines over the most recent survey cycles, including failures to implement infection-control programs and to timely report suspected abuse/neglect.
facilities.description: Nuuanu Hale is a Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility on Pali Highway in Honolulu, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. The 75-bed facility is operated as a for-profit corporation.

facilities.name: Kuakini Geriatric Care, Inc.
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating of 2 stars, compared to a Hawaii state average of roughly 4 and a national average of roughly 3.3 (source: NursingHomeSite.com CMS data mirror, July 2026). Nonprofit corporation ownership; daily average of about 113 residents.
facilities.description: Kuakini Geriatric Care, Inc. is a large, nonprofit, Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in the Kuakini Medical Center area of Honolulu. It is licensed for 187 beds and provides long-term skilled nursing care. Recent federal Care Compare data show an overall rating well below the state average.

facilities.name: Liliha Healthcare Center
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating reported as 2 stars by multiple sources (nursinghomedatabase.com, nursinghomesite.com, July 2026); one other source cites 5 stars, an outlier compared to the rest of the evidence gathered. Facility has a documented history of violations and fines in the last three years totaling roughly $161,000, including a Medicare payment suspension, with citations for failing to prevent infection spread and failing to designate an infection-prevention lead (source: nursinghomelawcenter.org, aggregating CMS inspection data).
facilities.description: Liliha Healthcare Center is a 92-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in the Liliha neighborhood of Honolulu, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.
facilities.serious_concern_note: CMS records show roughly $161,000 in federal fines and a period of Medicare payment suspension tied to documented quality problems.

facilities.name: Legacy Hilo Rehabilitation & Nursing Center
facilities.review_note: Overall two-star ('below average') CMS rating as of the May 2024 Care Compare update, with a breakdown of 3 stars for quality measures, 2 stars for health inspections, and 1 star for staffing (source: Care Changes, citing CMS data, retrieved July 2026).
facilities.description: Legacy Hilo Rehabilitation & Nursing Center is a 100-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility on Kaumana Drive in Hilo, part of the Ohana Pacific Health network. It offers short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. Its most recently reported CMS overall star rating is below the Hawaii state average, driven largely by a 1-star staffing score.

facilities.name: Hale Malamalama
facilities.review_note: One source (nursinghomesite.com, July 2026) reports a CMS overall rating of 1 star, compared to a Hawaii state average of roughly 4; another source instead cites 3 stars, reflecting different reporting snapshots. For-profit corporation ownership; small facility with 40 beds.
facilities.description: Hale Malamalama is a small, for-profit, Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in the Niu Valley area of Honolulu, licensed for 40 beds. Reported federal CMS star ratings for this facility vary across recent snapshots, with the lowest reported rating well below the state average.

facilities.name: Oahu Care Facility
facilities.review_note: CMS rating data for this facility is unusually inconsistent across aggregator snapshots gathered in July 2026: familyassets.com reports an overall rating of 3.0 (quality 4.0, staffing 2.0); nursinghomedatabase.com and mycaringplan.com also cite 3 stars in some snapshots but 2 stars in others; assistedlivingmagazine.com's page title labels it a '1-Star Nursing Home'; and US News cites a 5-star short-term-rehab distinction (a different, narrower measure than the CMS overall star rating). We report the overall-3 figure as the best-supported current reading but flag this facility's rating history as genuinely conflicting - families should verify current status directly at medicare.gov/care-compare before relying on any single number.
facilities.description: Oahu Care Facility is an 82-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in the Makiki area of Honolulu, offering intermediate and skilled nursing care, post-acute rehabilitation, and physical therapy. It is a for-profit partnership. Its CMS overall star rating has been reported inconsistently across data sources and appears to have fluctuated across recent survey cycles.

facilities.name: The Care Center of Honolulu
facilities.review_note: CMS rating snapshots gathered in July 2026 are split between 2 stars (nursinghomesite.com, seniorcare.com) and 3 stars (thecareratings.com, nursinghomedatabase.com); one source cites an aggregate of 2.71 across recent periods. We report 3 as the current best-supported figure but flag the discrepancy. Separately and more consequentially: the facility paid 3 fines in the last three years totaling $35,018, and CMS flagged it with a documented pattern of poor care for at least one month between August 2024 and July 2025 (closely-monitored status). Cited deficiencies include improper drug storage/labeling, staff competency gaps, and record-keeping and pressure-ulcer-care failures (source: ProPublica Nursing Home Inspect).
facilities.description: The Care Center of Honolulu is a large, for-profit, Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility on Bachelot Street in Honolulu. It operates the largest respiratory/ventilator care unit in the state alongside general skilled nursing, short-term rehabilitation, and long-term care.
facilities.serious_concern_note: CMS flagged a documented pattern of poor care warranting close monitoring, alongside roughly $35,000 in recent federal fines.

facilities.name: Life Care Center of Kona
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating of 3 stars (nursinghomesite.com, July 2026), but the facility also carries documented negative consumer-review evidence: Caring.com reviews (accessed July 2026) include praise for cleanliness and ocean views alongside a review describing it as 'the worst facility ever' with residents 'left alone for hours even after you buzz for assistance.' We show both the official CMS rating and this documented negative-review evidence per site policy.
facilities.description: Life Care Center of Kona is a 94-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Kailua-Kona on the Big Island, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care in a single-story building. It is part of the Life Care Centers of America network.

facilities.name: Domingo's Care Home
facilities.review_note: No Google or major-platform consumer rating was found for this facility as of July 2026. It appears as an active-licensed Type I Expanded Adult Residential Care Home (license #1309-C, licensee Myrna Domingo, license expiration 8/31/2026) in the Hawaii Department of Health Office of Health Care Assurance's Combined ARCH/Expanded ARCH Vacancy Report.
facilities.description: Domingo's Care Home is a state-licensed Type I Expanded Adult Residential Care Home (ARCH) in Kailua-Kona, licensed for 5 residents requiring ambulatory-level, 24-hour assistance, including special-diet accommodations. It appears with an active license in Hawaii's official ARCH vacancy listings.

facilities.name: Myles Care Home
facilities.review_note: No Google or major-platform consumer rating was found for this facility as of July 2026; CareListings notes there are no reviews on file for it. It is described by multiple senior-living directories as a licensed Adult Residential Care Home - Level 1.
facilities.description: Myles Care Home is a small, state-licensed Adult Residential Care Home (ARCH Level 1) in a residential neighborhood of Kahului, Maui, licensed for 5 residents. It offers individualized assistance with daily living activities.

facilities.name: Charity Adult Residential Care Home
facilities.review_note: No Google or major-platform consumer rating was found for this facility as of July 2026. It (registered as CEJ Charity ARCH-EC, L.L.C.) appears in the Hawaii Department of Health Office of Health Care Assurance's Combined ARCH/Expanded ARCH Vacancy Report, confirming active state licensure as an Expanded Care adult residential care home.
facilities.description: Charity Adult Residential Care Home is a small, state-licensed adult residential care home in Waipahu, Oahu, offering 24-hour supervision and assistance with daily living activities, including medication management.

facilities.name: Honesty
facilities.review_note: No Google or major-platform consumer rating was found for this facility as of July 2026. Its active state licensure is confirmed by a Hawaii Department of Health Office of Health Care Assurance Statement of Deficiencies/Plan of Correction document on file for this facility (dated 10/10/2024); the specific deficiencies cited in that document were not reviewed in detail and are not characterized here.
facilities.description: Honesty is a small, state-licensed 5-bed care home for the elderly in Wailuku, Maui, offering assisted living and memory care services in a residential setting. It has an official Hawaii DOH Office of Health Care Assurance survey record on file.

facilities.name: Mililani Care Home
facilities.review_note: Seniorly's proprietary quality score for this facility is 4.8 out of 10, as published on Seniorly's Mililani Care Home listing (retrieved July 2026) - notably below Seniorly's own average score for the Mililani area. At least one family testimonial quoted on the facility's own marketing materials is positive ('This place has restored our faith in senior care'); no independent third-party numeric Google rating was found.
facilities.description: Mililani Care Home is a small, state-licensed Adult Residential Care Home - Level 1 in Mililani, Oahu, licensed for 5 residents, offering 24-hour supervised care, meals, housekeeping, and medication management. Available third-party quality scoring for this home is mixed to below-average, while the facility's own marketing cites positive family feedback.

facilities.name: Wilson Senior Living Kailua
facilities.review_note: 4.1/5 average 'overall experience' rating across 8 reviews on A Place for Mom (retrieved July 2026); A Place for Mom's own proprietary review score is listed as 0 out of 10 because no reviews were submitted in the most recent 2-year window, indicating the positive rating is based on older reviews rather than recent resident/family experience.
facilities.description: Wilson Senior Living Kailua is a newer adult residential care home in the Aikahi area of Kailua, Oahu, with 19 private, ADA-compliant rooms. It offers assisted living-level care and services.

facilities.name: Ruth's House
facilities.review_note: No Google or major-platform consumer rating was found for this facility as of July 2026.
facilities.description: Ruth's House is a small assisted living community in Kailua-Kona on the Big Island, offering personal care assistance including bathing, grooming, dressing, and meal preparation. It also operates an adult day program.

organizations.name: Arcadia Family of Companies
organizations.description: The Arcadia Family of Companies is a Honolulu-based nonprofit senior services organization affiliated with the United Church of Christ, tracing its roots to the 1967 opening of Arcadia Retirement Residence. It operates two continuing care retirement communities in Honolulu — Arcadia Retirement Residence and 15 Craigside — both with CMS 5-star skilled nursing units, along with home care and adult day programs.

organizations.name: The Plaza Assisted Living
organizations.description: The Plaza Assisted Living is a Hawaii-based senior living operator with multiple purpose-built communities across Oahu, including locations in Punchbowl, Moanalua, Mililani, Pearl City, Waikiki, and Kaneohe. Its communities offer independent living, assisted living, the Hali'a memory care program, and short-term respite stays.

organizations.name: Good Samaritan Society
organizations.description: The Evangelical Lutheran Good Samaritan Society is one of the largest nonprofit providers of senior care and services in the United States and has been an affiliate of Sanford Health since 2019. Pohai Nani in Kaneohe is its Hawaii continuing care retirement community.

organizations.name: Kisco Senior Living
organizations.description: Kisco Senior Living, founded in 1990 and headquartered in Carlsbad, California, develops and operates upscale senior living communities in several states offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. 'Ilima at Leihano in Kapolei is its Hawaii community.

organizations.name: Regency Pacific
organizations.description: Regency Pacific manages senior living and care communities across the Pacific Northwest and Hawaii, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing. Its Hawaii communities include Regency at Puakea on Kauai and Regency at Hualalai on the Big Island.

organizations.name: Ohana Pacific Health
organizations.description: Founded on Oahu in 1998, Ohana Pacific Health is the largest post-acute care organization in Hawaii, with 17 health care entities and roughly 1,500 employees across Oahu, Maui, Kauai, and Hawaii Island. Services span long-term care, skilled nursing, rehabilitation, memory care, home health, and adult day health; Maui's Hale Makua Health Services affiliated with the organization in 2023.

organizations.name: Life Care Centers of America
organizations.description: Founded in 1976 and headquartered in Cleveland, Tennessee, Life Care Centers of America is one of the largest privately held nursing home operators in the United States, with more than 200 skilled nursing and rehabilitation centers across over 25 states. In Hawaii it operates Ka Punawai Ola in Kapolei and Life Care Center of Hilo.

organizations.name: Holiday by Atria
organizations.description: Holiday by Atria is one of the largest independent senior living operators in the United States, running roughly 240 communities nationwide since Holiday Retirement was acquired by Atria Senior Living in 2021. Its communities bundle meals, housekeeping, utilities, and activities into a single monthly rate; Kalama Heights in Kihei is its Maui community.

organizations.name: Oakmont Senior Living
organizations.description: Oakmont Senior Living, with nearly three decades of experience, holds a portfolio of over 100 senior living communities offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care, including the Ivy Living brand. The Ivy at Hawaii Kai in Honolulu is its Hawaii community.

organizations.name: Maui Health
organizations.description: Maui Health, affiliated with Kaiser Permanente since 2017, operates Maui Memorial Medical Center, Kula Hospital and Clinic, and Lanai Community Hospital, serving the residents of Maui County. Its Kula Hospital campus includes one of the state's highest-rated hospital-based long-term care units.

organizations.name: Avalon Health Care
organizations.description: Avalon Health Care is a regional operator of skilled nursing, rehabilitation, assisted living, and long-term care facilities across the western United States, headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah. Its Hawaii presence includes Avalon Care Center - Honolulu.
